description: Migrar ralph.sh para CLI Node.js/TypeScript executavel via npx ralph-agent

userStories.title: Inicializar projeto TypeScript com dependencias e configuracao de build
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the TypeScript project scaffolded with all dependencies and build configuration so that subsequent stories have a working development environment.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json criado em packages/ralph-agent/ com name ralph-agent, bin field, type module, engines >=18.0.0
Dependencias instaladas: commander, chalk, ora, execa
Dev dependencies: typescript, tsup, vitest, @types/node
tsconfig.json configurado para ES modules, target ES2022, strict mode
tsup.config.ts configurado para gerar dist/cli.js com shebang #!/usr/bin/env node
Build funciona: npm run build gera dist/cli.js executavel
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar types.ts com interfaces compartilhadas
userStories.description: As a developer, I want TypeScript interfaces for TaskPlan, UserStory, PipelineState, and LastError so that all modules have type-safe contracts for tasks.json data.
acceptanceCriteria: Interface UserStory com campos: id, title, description, acceptanceCriteria, priority, passes, notes
Interface LastError com campos: category, message, at
Interface PipelineState com campos: analyzeCompleted, prdCompleted, jsonCompleted, executionCompleted, reviewCompleted, prCreated
Interface TaskPlan com todos os campos do tasks.json
Tipos exportados e importaveis por outros modulos
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar utils/shell.ts e utils/git.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want utility functions for shell execution and git operations so that other modules can execute commands and detect git context.
acceptanceCriteria: shell.ts: funcao exec que usa execa para executar comandos com captura de stdout/stderr
git.ts: funcao getProjectRoot() que retorna o root do repositorio git
git.ts: funcao getCurrentBranch() que retorna o branch atual
Tratamento de erros quando git nao esta disponivel ou nao e um repositorio
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar core/state-manager.ts para CRUD tipado de tasks.json
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a typed state manager that reads and writes tasks.json so that all JSON manipulation uses TypeScript instead of jq.
acceptanceCriteria: Funcao loadTaskPlan(path) que le e parseia tasks.json com validacao de estrutura
Funcao saveTaskPlan(path, plan) que escreve atomicamente (write-to-temp + rename)
Funcao initializeState(plan) que preenche campos default
Funcao allStoriesPass(plan) que verifica se todas as stories tem passes=true
Funcao markStoryPassing(plan, storyId) que marca uma story como passes=true
Funcao markIssueInProgress(plan) e markIssueCompleted(plan) para atualizar status
Funcoes setLastError(plan, category, message) e clearLastError(plan, attemptStartedAt)
Escrita atomica: write-to-temp + rename para evitar corrupcao
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar core/prompt-resolver.ts para resolucao de prompt.md
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a prompt resolver that loads prompt.md locally or downloads remotely, and replaces placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: Funcao resolvePrompt(options) que busca prompt.md local ou remoto via fetch
Funcao applyPlaceholders(template, vars) que substitui __PRD_FILE__ e __PROGRESS_FILE__
Download remoto usa fetch nativo do Node 18+
Erro claro se prompt.md nao encontrado e download falha
Cleanup de arquivo temporario em caso de download remoto
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar utils/retry.ts com deteccao de falhas transientes e backoff
userStories.description: As a developer, I want retry logic with exponential backoff and transient failure detection.
acceptanceCriteria: Funcao isTransientFailure(exitCode, output) que detecta falhas transientes
Funcao retryDelaySeconds(attempt, baseSeconds, maxSeconds) com backoff exponencial
Mesmas heuristicas de deteccao do script Bash original
Base default 30s, max default 900s
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar ui/logger.ts, ui/progress.ts e ui/summary.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want terminal UI utilities for the CLI output.
acceptanceCriteria: logger.ts: funcoes printSuccess, printError, printWarning, printRetry, printInfo com chalk
logger.ts: deteccao de NO_COLOR e non-TTY para desabilitar cores/unicode
progress.ts: funcao printProgressBar e printIterationHeader com status de cada story
summary.ts: funcao printBox com box drawing e fallback ASCII
summary.ts: funcao printStartupHeader e printSummaryBox
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar core/executor.ts para invocacao do Claude CLI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an executor module that invokes Claude CLI via execa.
acceptanceCriteria: Funcao executeClaude(prompt) que executa claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --print via execa
Captura de stdout e stderr combinados
Retorno de { exitCode, output } sem lancar excecao em exit code nao-zero
Output do Claude redirecionado para stderr do processo
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar config.ts para resolucao de configuracao e CLI parsing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want configuration resolution that merges CLI arguments with defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: Interface RalphConfig com todos os campos necessarios
Defaults identicos ao Bash: retryLimit=10, retryForever=false, backoffBase=30, backoffMax=900
Resolucao de paths baseados em issueNumber ou modo standalone
Validacao de dependencias: git e claude disponiveis
Hints de instalacao por plataforma
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar core/engine.ts com loop principal
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the main engine loop that orchestrates all modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Funcao runEngine(config) que executa o loop principal
Inicializacao: carrega tasks.json, valida estado, verifica se ja completo
Archive de run anterior se branch mudou
Loop com verificacao de limite, substituicao de placeholders, execucao do Claude
Deteccao de <promise>COMPLETE</promise> com validacao
Retry com backoff para falhas transientes
Exit com erro para falhas fatais
Decrementa iteracao em retry
Summary box no final
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar cli.ts como entry point com commander
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a CLI entry point using commander that parses arguments and invokes the engine.
acceptanceCriteria: Parsing de flags: --issue N, --max-iterations N, --retry-limit N, --retry-forever, --help
Argumento posicional numerico como alias para --max-iterations
Validacao de argumentos numericos
Invocacao do engine com config resolvido
Exit codes identicos ao Bash
Build gera dist/cli.js executavel com shebang
npx ralph-agent --help exibe uso
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Adicionar testes unitarios para state-manager, retry e prompt-resolver
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the critical modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Testes para state-manager: load, save, initialize, allStoriesPass, markStoryPassing, markIssueCompleted, setLastError, clearLastError
Testes para retry: isTransientFailure, retryDelaySeconds
Testes para prompt-resolver: applyPlaceholders
Todos os testes passam com npx vitest run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configurar build final, npm publish e documentacao
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the package fully configured for npm publish with updated documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json com files: [dist], version 1.0.0, description, keywords, license, repository
npm run build gera pacote funcional
README.md em packages/ralph-agent/ com instrucoes de uso e migracao
Referencia atualizada no scripts/ralph/README.md mencionando a nova CLI
.npmignore ou files field configurado para excluir src/ e testes
Typecheck passes
